name: Quick Oyster Pickup
recipeIngredient: 1 Package cream of leek soup mix, (1 3/4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw frozen oysters.
2. Drain the oysters, reserving the liquor.
3. Add the oyster liquor and water to the soup mix and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat and stir occasionally until boiling subsides.
5. Add the oysters and heat for 3 to 5 minutes longer or until edges of the oysters begin to curl.
6. Sprinkle with parsley.
Note: Approximately 65 calories per serving.
